---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Lore
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or use case

A short description of the problem or use case (e.g. "I always want to..." or "It's frustrating when...").

## Proposed solution

What you’d like to see (e.g. a new button, a new export format, a setting).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or existing workarounds you’ve thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links that help explain the idea.
